title: Custom Value Popup with Broadcaster
description: Engine.createBroadcaster with attachToComponentMouseEvents to show a positioned label as a custom value popup on knob drag. Tracks click, drag, and mouseUp events to position, update text, and hide the popup label dynamically.

title: HSL Image Tinting on Panel
description: Graphics.applyHSL inside a beginLayer/endLayer block to apply hue, saturation, and lightness adjustments to a drawn image. Uses Engine.loadImageIntoPool and panel.loadImage with three knob control callbacks to adjust each HSL parameter.

title: Radio Button Toggle with Ctrl Override
description: Content.getAllComponents with a regex pattern to create radio-button behavior across a set of buttons. Uses Content.isCtrlDown() to allow multi-selection when the Ctrl key is held.

title: Arc Drawing on Panel
description: Content.createPath with addArc and drawPath to draw partial arcs on a panel. Uses getBounds on the path for proper scaling and a pathData object to configure stroke thickness and type.

title: Rotating 3D Cube Renderer
description: Content.createPath with perspective projection math to render and animate a wireframe 3D cube on a panel. Uses setTimerCallback for continuous rotation and inline helper functions for rotation and normalized projection.

title: Macro Control Knob Array
description: Synth.setMacroControl with Content.getAllComponents to map an array of knobs to HISE macro controls. Uses indexOf to determine the macro index from the component reference.

title: ModWheel LAF with Gradient Lighting
description: LAF drawRotarySlider function that renders a realistic mod wheel with horizontal scrolling lines, a handle bar, and layered gradient lighting and shading effects. Uses setGradientFill for top/bottom shading and drawHorizontalLine for the wheel texture.

title: MIDI File Drag to DAW
description: Panel setMouseCallback with startExternalFileDrag and MidiPlayer.saveAsMidiFile to enable dragging a MIDI sequence from HISE into the DAW. Uses FileSystem.getFolder to create a temporary export file in AppData.

title: SliderPack Radio Button Behavior
description: Two SliderPacks linked to behave like radio buttons — clicking a slider in one pack resets the corresponding slider in the other. Uses setSliderAtIndex and changed() to synchronize mutual exclusion.

title: Shared SliderPack Data for Two LFOs
description: Engine.createAndRegisterSliderPackData with referToData and linkTo to share a single SliderPack UI across two LFO modulators. Both LFOs read from the same registered data source.

title: Background Audio Rendering to File
description: AudioSampleProcessor getAudioFile with setContentCallback to capture rendered audio from a file player into a buffer and write it to disk. Uses FileSystem.fromReferenceString and writeAudioFile to save the processed output as a WAV file alongside the source.

title: SliderPack LAF with Step Grid
description: LAF drawLinearSlider function for a SliderPack with integer step size. Draws a filled rectangle at the current value position and a background grid aligned to the step divisions.

title: Wavetable Position Mouse Drag
description: Panel setMouseCallback to control a wavetable synthesizer's table position by dragging vertically. Maps the mouse Y coordinate to a 0-1 range and applies it via setAttribute on the wavetable synth.

title: Viewport Item Name Lookup
description: Viewport control callback that splits the items property by newline to convert it to an array, then uses the viewport's selected index to retrieve the corresponding item name.
